headline: How The L3Harris Technologies (LHX) Narrative Is Shifting With Missile Spin Out And New Investment
summary: Analysts have been nudging their views on L3Harris Technologies, with fair value estimates moving from US$382.37 to US$388.11 per share and some individual price targets now reaching as high as US$420. These shifts are tied to recent research that factors in the planned Missile Solutions spin out, the proposed US$1b Department of War convertible preferred investment, and management’s longer term targets from the investor day. Read on to see what is driving those model tweaks and how you can...

headline: Lockheed Martin vs. L3Harris: Which Defense Giant Belongs in Your Portfolio?
summary: Lockheed Martin (NYSE: LMT) and L3Harris Technologies (NYSE: LHX) both reported Q4 2025 earnings on January 29, 2026. One is the largest defense prime contractor on earth, building jets and missiles at scale. The other is the electronics and communications backbone that makes those weapons systems work. Both cite the same tailwinds. The question is ... Lockheed Martin vs. L3Harris: Which Defense Giant Belongs in Your Portfolio?
